result:
All changes are complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Changes Made

### Problem
The "discard changes" dialog showed generic "OK" and "Cancel" buttons, which weren't descriptive for the "Close and lose current input?" message.

### Solution
Updated the dialog to use Anki backend translations (`TR`) for more descriptive button labels and message text:
- **Positive button**: "Discard" (from new string resource `R.string.discard`)
- **Negative button**: "Keep Editing" (from `TR.addingKeepEditing()`)
- **Message**: "Discard current input?" (from `TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()`)

### Files Modified (6 files)

1. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/DiscardChangesDialog.kt`** - Changed from `class` with `companion object` to `object`. Added `positiveButtonText`, `negativeButtonText`, and `message` parameters to `showDialog()`. Now uses text-based button labels and message instead of hardcoded string resources.

2. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/NoteEditor.kt`** (line 1258) - Updated call to pass `getString(R.string.discard)`, `TR.addingKeepEditing()`, and `TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()`.

3. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditor.kt`** (line 201) - Updated call with new parameters, added `CollectionManager` import.

4. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.kt`** (line 102) - Updated call with new parameters, added `CollectionManager` import.

5. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/EditDeckDescriptionDialog.kt`** (line 110) - Updated call with new parameters, added `CollectionManager` import.

6. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/pages/DeckOptions.kt`** (line 58) - Updated call with new parameters.

7. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/02-strings.xml`** (line 98) - Added new string resource `<string name="discard">Discard</string>`.
